title: The Dead Letter Office
summary: A walkable basement mail hall. Undeliverable letters fall from a ceiling chute into the wire basket while the postmaster works his endless shift; opened letters can be read, and a few return addresses still work.
notes: Four ink-blue return addresses use shared random drift; the stairwell door is a fifth exit. Letters are authored, not generated. Full 3D room since 2026-07-21: the Meshy-rigged postmaster walks his shift (desk, basket pickups, filing, furnace, punch clock, coffee); mail falls from a ceiling chute into the wire basket; ambience + SFX through the shared sound control; punch clock tracks visit time.
